/opt/atk-dlrk3568-5_10_sdk-toolchain/bin/aarch64-buildroot-linux-gnu-g++   -Wall -Wextra -O2 -g  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/v4l2_mpp_rtsp.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/v4l2_mpp_rtsp.dir/v4l2_capture.c.o CMakeFiles/v4l2_mpp_rtsp.dir/mpp_encoder.c.o CMakeFiles/v4l2_mpp_rtsp.dir/ts_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/v4l2_mpp_rtsp.dir/H264FramedSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v4l2_mpp_rtsp.dir/rtsp_server.cpp.o  -o v4l2_mpp_rtsp -lrockchip_mpp -lliveMedia -lgroupsock -lBasicUsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment -lpthread
